name: Before-After-Bridge
best_for: transformations that can be shown, not just claimed
ideas where the end state is more persuasive than the method
aspirational content that must stay credible

beat_sequence.beat_job: Show the current frustrating state so plainly the viewer says 'that is me right now'.
Show the desired end state early enough that staying feels like the only way to learn the route.
Walk the specific path from before to after; the method is the reward for staying.
Invite the viewer to cross the bridge themselves: save the steps or start with step one today.

retention_or_clarity_job: Creates an open loop by showing the destination before revealing the route.
avoid_when: The transformation cannot be honestly evidenced; an unearned after-state burns trust.
The change is incremental rather than visible; a subtle delta undercuts the contrast this template depends on.
